JUDGE MASON, M.NORMAN,CSR, K.LEE,CLERK 02:59PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PLTF & DEFT BYERS ARE PRESENT AND PRO PER. DEFT. PEDRO LOLY NOT PRESENT. CASE IS SETTLED. TERMS ON THE RECORD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BYERS, BEVERLY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2084 MISSION STREET, ROOM 1A, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF TO PROVIDE DFT BYERS WITH OTHER AVAILABLE UNIT BY 3-1-95 AT RENT OF $85/WEEK & DFT TO PAY PLTFF THE SUM OF $449.28 BY 4-1-95. IF ALL CONDS MET BY 4-1-95, PLTFF TO FILE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMNT. PLTF WILL SEKK DEFAULT JUDGMNT AGAINST DEFT PEDRO LOLY.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BYERS, BEVERLY LOLY, PEDRO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2084 MISSION STREET, ROOM 1A, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, PLTF TO PROVIDE DFT BYERS WITH OTHER AVAILABLE UNIT BY 3-1-9 5 AT RENT OF $85/WEEK;DFT TO PAY PLTF SUM OF $449.28 BY 4-1-95.IF ALL CONDS MET BY 4-1-95,PLTF WILL FILE SATISFACTN OF JUDGMENT AS TO DFT BYERS.PLTF AWARDED POSSESSION OF PREM- ISES ONLY AS TO DFT PEDRO LOLLY,DEFAULT HAVING BEEN ENTERED.
